zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Wadhams於大約1559年出生在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。她和John Wadhams至少有1個兒子。她去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wadhams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Wadhams was born about 1559, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States. She had at least 1 son with John Wadhams. She died in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールド
ja.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Uni: アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Wadhamsは約1559年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで生まれた。彼女はJohn Wadhamsとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで死去した。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Wadhams(은)는 대략 1559년 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 John Wadhams(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 사망했다.
